about.title: About us
about.mission: Our mission is to build energy-efficient, comfortable and fully modular Tiny House Units with unmatched value.
about.team_bio: With a passion for sustainable and affordable housing, Thomas founded Tiny House Heavens to make modular tiny house living accessible to everyone across Europe.

seo.home_desc: Buy a modular tiny house in Belgium. Discover 20 models from 13m² to 112m². Sustainable, affordable and ecological living across Europe. Request a free quote.

seo.models_desc: Browse all 20 tiny house models. From compact studios (13m²) to family homes (112m²). Choose from 3 finishing levels. Tiny houses for sale in Belgium.

seo.about_desc: Learn more about Tiny House Heavens. Belgian craftsmanship, modular construction and sustainable materials. 20 tiny house models available across Europe.
seo.services_title: Services | From Design to Delivery of Your Tiny House | Tiny House Heavens
seo.services_desc: Full service for your tiny house: design, model selection, custom finishing, transport, foundation and aftercare. All-in-one in Belgium.

seo.contact_desc: Request a free quote for your modular tiny house. Visit us in Sint-Katelijne-Waver or contact us online.

home_content.section_title: A tiny house shaped around you
home_content.paragraph_1: At Tiny House Heavens, we design modular tiny houses that grow with your life. 20 models, from compact 13 m² studios to spacious 112 m² family homes with multiple bedrooms — so there's always a design that fits the way you actually want to live.
home_content.paragraph_2: Every model sits on a steel undercarriage, with timber frame construction and 150-200 mm insulation for a warm, quiet interior. You decide how far we go: House Kit for self-builders, Basic for a fully finished home, or Optima for a turnkey experience.
home_content.paragraph_3: Sustainable, affordable and energy-efficient: modern design paired with craftsmanship, delivered across Europe. Whether it's a starter home, a garden annex or a fully autonomous house — we walk with you from first sketch to delivery.
